config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				check whether user is authenticated if not return to login poge
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		previousPage = self.session.custom.IsPlantConfigurationAuthenticated
		if not previousPage:
			system.perspective.navigate('/')
		else:
			self.session.custom.TopViewHeader = "Plant Configuration"
			#show add/edit panel and refresh table
			system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	#End of try block
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup -> PlantConfiguration')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

transforms.code:
value=self.custom.Timeout-1
	if value<=0:
		self.session.custom.previousPageUrl =''
		self.view.custom.Timeout = self.view.custom.Timeout_SP_Seconds	
		system.perspective.closePopup("")	
		system.perspective.navigate("/")
	return value

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Closing/Opening view based on row Selection. 
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block
		#system.perspective.print("In side the loop000")
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock('rightView')
		selectedRow = self.props.selection.selectedRow
		pydata = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(self.props.data)
		countWI = 0
		if(len(pydata) > 0):
			for rows in range(len(pydata)):
				if(selectedRow == rows):
					UnitId = pydata[rows]['UnitId']
					name = pydata[rows]['Unit name']
					desc = pydata[rows]['Unit description']
					levelId = pydata[rows]['Unit Level ID']	
					level = pydata[rows]['Unit level']	
					attachedId = pydata[rows]['AttachedToId']
					attached = pydata[rows]['Attached To']
					isActive = pydata[rows]['Active']
					ipAddress = pydata[rows]['IP Address']
					WorkStationTypeId = pydata[rows]['WorkStationTypeId']
					WorkStationType = pydata[rows]['WorkStation Type']
					LineTypeID=pydata[rows]['LineTypeID']
					PlantAddress=pydata[rows]['PlantAddress']
					PlantCode=pydata[rows]['PlantCode']
					#system.perspective.print({'UnitId':UnitId,'UnitName':str(name),'UnitDescription':str(desc),'UnitLevel':levelId,'AttachedTo':attachedId,'isActive':isActive,'IPAddress':ipAddress,'WorkStationTypeId':WorkStationTypeId,'LineTypeID':int(LineTypeID)})
					break	

		headerLabel = "Edit"
		messageType = 'plantPanel'
		#messageTypeAuditLog='plantPanelAuditLog'
		payload = {'UnitId':int(UnitId),'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':str(name),'UnitDescription':desc,'UnitLevel':int(levelId),'AttachedTo':int(attachedId),'isActive':int(isActive),'IPAddress':ipAddress,'WorkStationTypeId':int(WorkStationTypeId),'LineTypeID':int(LineTypeID),'PlantCode':PlantCode,'PlantAddress':PlantAddress}	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page')
		#system.perspective.sendMessage(messageTypeAuditLog, payload, scope = 'page')
		folderName = 'Project_VECV/Plant'
		colName = 'UnitId'
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1,"id":int(UnitId),"folder":str(folderName),"colName":str(colName)}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("plantDeleteDetails",payload = {"LevelId":int(levelId)}, scope = "page")


	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onRowClick -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntTable/tblEquip')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		system.perspective.print(str(description) + '  ' + str(lineNumber))
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 28/03/2024
			Purpose:			 
					To pass value to custom 
		"""	
	# implement your handler here
	self.props.selection.selectedRow = payload['Index']

"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 28/03/2024
			Purpose:			 
					To refresh table
		"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		areaid=self.getSibling("SearchPanel").props.params.Area
		lineid=self.getSibling("SearchPanel").props.params.Line
		workstationid=self.getSibling("SearchPanel").props.params.Workstation
		param={'areaid':areaid,'lineid':lineid,'workstationid':workstationid}
		equipData = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/Get_AllPlant",param)	
		self.props.data = equipData
		
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'plantPanel'   				
#		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'id':'','name':'','desc':'','level':int(-1),'attached':int(-1),'isActive':bool(1),'deviceType':int(-1),'ipAddress':'','attachedWorkStationId':int(-1),'isDualWorkStationEnabled':int(1),'plcIndex':int(-1),'asset':-1,'isDualWorkStation':-1,'lineTypeId':-1}
		payload = {'UnitId':int(-1),'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','UnitLevel':int(-1),'AttachedTo':int(-1),'isActive':int(1),'IPAddress':'','WorkStationTypeId':-1,'LineTypeID':-1,'PlantCode':'','PlantAddress':''}	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableRow",payload = {"Index":-1}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")	
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:tableRefresh -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntTable/tblEquip')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

config.script:
"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose:			 
					Open panel on item clicked
		"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		tableData = self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").props.data
		tableData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(tableData)

		selectedId = event['data']
#		isDualWorkStationEnabled = 1
		if(len(tableData) > 0):
			for rows in range(len(tableData)):		
				plantid = tableData[rows]['Id']
				if(selectedId == plantid):
					name = tableData[rows]['Unit name']
					desc = tableData[rows]['Unit description']
					levelId = tableData[rows]['LevelId']	
					attachedId = tableData[rows]['MasterId']
					isAcive = tableData[rows]['Active']
					devicetypeid = tableData[rows]['DeviceTypeId']
					ipAddress = tableData[rows]['IP address']
					asset = tableData[rows]['Asset Number']
					isDualWorkStation = tableData[rows]['DualWorkStation']
					attachedDualWorkStationId = tableData[rows]['AttachedWorkStationId']
					attachedDualWorkStationName = tableData[rows]['AttachedWorkStationName']
					isDualWorkStationEnabled = tableData[rows]['IsDualWorkStationVisible']
					lineTypeId = tableData[rows]['LineTypeId']					  
					plcIndex = tableData[rows]['PlcIndex']
					#AP 05042022
					WorkStationTypeId = tableData[rows]['WorkStationTypeId']
					break		
			
		if(isDualWorkStationEnabled == 1):
			isDualWorkStationEnabled = 0
		else:
			isDualWorkStationEnabled = 1	
			
		headerLabel = "Edit"
		messageType = 'equipPanel'   				
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'id':int(plantid),'name':str(name),'desc':str(desc),'level':int(levelId),'attached':int(attachedId),'isActive':int(isAcive),'deviceType':int(devicetypeid),'ipAddress':ipAddress,'asset':asset,'isDualWorkStation':isDualWorkStation,'attachedWorkStationId':attachedDualWorkStationId,'isDualWorkStationEnabled':isDualWorkStationEnabled,'lineTypeId':int(lineTypeId),'plcIndex':int(plcIndex),'WorkStationTypeId':int(WorkStationTypeId)}	 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
		
		

		params = {'Id':int(plantid)}
		result = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/Check_Delete",params)
		if(int(result) > 0):		
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").custom.result = result
			folderName = 'Project_VECV/Plant'	
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntDelete").props.params.id = int(plantid)
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntDelete").props.params.folderName = folderName
			self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("cntDelete").props.params.colName = 'Id'				
			system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
		else:	
			self.parent.parent.getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").custom.result = result
			system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")
			
			
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":1}, scope = "page")	
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onItemClicked -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntHierarchy/treeHierarchy')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Script to Export Details.
	"""
	try:
	#start of try block 
		list = self.view.custom.exportData
		lenList = len(list)
		header = ['Unit name','Unit level','Attached to']
		data = []
		for row in range(lenList):
			labelArea = list[row]['label']
			itemLine = list[row]['items']
			lenLine = len(itemLine)
			data.append([labelArea,'Plant',''])
			for rowLine in range(lenLine):
				labelLine = itemLine[rowLine]['label']
				itemWorkStation = itemLine[rowLine]['items']
				lenWorkStation = len(itemWorkStation)
				data.append([labelLine,'Area',labelArea,])
				for rowWorkStation in range(lenWorkStation):
					labelWorkStation = itemWorkStation[rowWorkStation]['label']
					itemDevice = itemWorkStation[rowWorkStation]['items']
					lenDevice = len(itemDevice)
					data.append([labelWorkStation,'Line',labelLine])
					for rowDevice in range(lenDevice):
						labelDevice = itemDevice[rowDevice]['label']
						data.append([labelDevice,'Workstation',labelWorkStation])
						
		finalData = system.dataset.toDataSet(header,data)
		XLSFormat = system.dataset.dataSetToExcel(True,[finalData])
		system.perspective.download("PlantHierarchy.xls",XLSFormat)				
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onActionPerformed -> cntBody/TabContainer/cntHierarchy/btnExport')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose: switch tab			 
					
		"""	
	try:
	#start of try block 
		currentIndex = self.props.currentTabIndex
		#system.perspective.print('HIERARCHY TREE REFRESH--START  main')
		#Icon path
		icon1 = "material/tv" # "new_icons/precision_manufacturing"
		icon2 = "material/store"
		icon3 = "material/linear_scale" #"new_icons/dataset"
		icon4 = "material/home_work"
		icon5 = "material/business"
		rightArrow = ' \t '+u'\u27A1'+' \t'
		
		header = ["Id","Name","Related_id","Level","icon"] 
		data = []
		finalData = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/Get_AllPlant_Active")
		finalData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(finalData)
	
		totalLevelCount = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/GetLowestLevel")   
		totalLevelCount = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(totalLevelCount)
	

		for rowtotalLevelCount in range(len(totalLevelCount)):
			totalLevel = totalLevelCount[rowtotalLevelCount][0]
			lowestLevel = totalLevelCount[rowtotalLevelCount][1]
	
		LevelNew = 0
		lowerList = []


		for rowOuter in range(totalLevel):
			if(rowOuter > 1):
				lowerList = lowerList+thirdList
			secondList = []
			thirdList = []    
			for rows in range(len(finalData)):
				level = finalData[rows][4]
				if (level == 1):
					iconPath = icon1
				elif (level == 2):
					iconPath = icon2
				elif (level == 3):
					iconPath = icon3
				elif (level == 4):
					iconPath = icon4
				elif (level == 5):
					iconPath = icon5
				
				imgIcon =  {
					  "path": iconPath,"color": "#555555","style": {}
					}
	
				if((level == lowestLevel and rowOuter == 0)):
					id = finalData[rows][0]
					name = finalData[rows][1]
					unitLevel = finalData[rows][3]
					relatedId = finalData[rows][6]
					if (id!='' and name!='' and relatedId!=''):
						lowerList.append({'label':(str(unitLevel) + rightArrow + str(name)),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId': int(id),'relatedId':relatedId},'icon':imgIcon,'items':[]})
						#system.perspective.print("Lower list  " + str(lowerList))
				else:
					if(level == lowestLevel):
						name = finalData[rows][1]
						unitLevel = finalData[rows][3]
						relatedId = finalData[rows][6]
						id = finalData[rows][0]
						
						if (level == 1):
							iconPath = icon1
						elif (level == 2):
							iconPath = icon2
						elif (level == 3):
							iconPath = icon3
						elif (level == 4):
							iconPath = icon4
						elif (level == 5):
							iconPath = icon5

						
						imgIcon =  {
							  "path": iconPath,"color": "#555555", "style": {}
							}
						
						for rowList in range(len(lowerList)):
							relatedId1 = lowerList[rowList]['data']['relatedId']
							name1 = lowerList[rowList]['label']
							lowestId = lowerList[rowList]['data']['dataId']
							iconSet = lowerList[rowList]['icon']
							
							if id == relatedId1 :
								if(rowOuter > 1):
									try:    
										items = lowerList[rowList]['items']
										secondList.append({'label':(name1),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':lowestId,'relatedId':relatedId1},'items':items,'icon':iconSet})
									except KeyError:
										secondList.append({'label':(name1),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':lowestId,'relatedId':relatedId1},'icon':iconSet,'items':[]})
										#system.perspective.print("Second list  " + str(secondList))
										#system.perspective.print('HIERARCHY TREE REFRESH--KeyError')
								else:
									secondList.append({'label':(name1),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':lowestId,'relatedId':relatedId1},'icon':iconSet,'items':[]})     
						thirdList.append({'label':(str(unitLevel)+ rightArrow + str(name)),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':id,'relatedId':relatedId},'items':secondList,'icon':imgIcon})        
						#system.perspective.print("thirdList list  " + str(thirdList))
						secondList = []	
			lowestLevel = lowestLevel + 1    
					
			
			self.getChild("cntHierarchy").getChild("treeHierarchy").props.items = thirdList
			self.view.custom.exportData = thirdList
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onClick -> cntBody/TabContainer')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
				Written By: Niladri Banerjee
				Written Date: 06/05/2024
				Purpose: switch tab			 
						
			"""	
	try:
		#start of try block 
			currentIndex = self.props.currentTabIndex
			#system.perspective.print('HIERARCHY TREE REFRESH--START  main')
			#Icon path
			icon1 = "material/tv" # "new_icons/precision_manufacturing"
			icon2 = "material/store"
			icon3 = "material/linear_scale" #"new_icons/dataset"
			icon4 = "material/home_work"
			icon5 = "material/business"
			rightArrow = ' \t '+u'\u27A1'+' \t'
			
			header = ["Id","Name","Related_id","Level","icon"] 
			data = []
			finalData = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/Get_AllPlant_Active")
			finalData = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(finalData)
		
			totalLevelCount = system.db.runNamedQuery("Project_VECV/Plant/GetLowestLevel")   
			totalLevelCount = system.dataset.toPyDataSet(totalLevelCount)
		
	
			for rowtotalLevelCount in range(len(totalLevelCount)):
				totalLevel = totalLevelCount[rowtotalLevelCount][0]
				lowestLevel = totalLevelCount[rowtotalLevelCount][1]
		
			LevelNew = 0
			lowerList = []
	
	
			for rowOuter in range(totalLevel):
				if(rowOuter > 1):
					lowerList = lowerList+thirdList
				secondList = []
				thirdList = []    
				for rows in range(len(finalData)):
					level = finalData[rows][4]
					if (level == 1):
						iconPath = icon1
					elif (level == 2):
						iconPath = icon2
					elif (level == 3):
						iconPath = icon3
					elif (level == 4):
						iconPath = icon4
					elif (level == 5):
						iconPath = icon5
					
					imgIcon =  {
						  "path": iconPath,"color": "#555555","style": {}
						}
		
					if((level == lowestLevel and rowOuter == 0)):
						id = finalData[rows][0]
						name = finalData[rows][1]
						unitLevel = finalData[rows][3]
						relatedId = finalData[rows][6]
						if (id!='' and name!='' and relatedId!=''):
							lowerList.append({'label':(str(unitLevel) + rightArrow + str(name)),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId': int(id),'relatedId':relatedId},'icon':imgIcon,'items':[]})
							#system.perspective.print("Lower list  " + str(lowerList))
					else:
						if(level == lowestLevel):
							name = finalData[rows][1]
							unitLevel = finalData[rows][3]
							relatedId = finalData[rows][6]
							id = finalData[rows][0]
							
							if (level == 1):
								iconPath = icon1
							elif (level == 2):
								iconPath = icon2
							elif (level == 3):
								iconPath = icon3
							elif (level == 4):
								iconPath = icon4
							elif (level == 5):
								iconPath = icon5
	
							
							imgIcon =  {
								  "path": iconPath,"color": "#555555", "style": {}
								}
							
							for rowList in range(len(lowerList)):
								relatedId1 = lowerList[rowList]['data']['relatedId']
								name1 = lowerList[rowList]['label']
								lowestId = lowerList[rowList]['data']['dataId']
								iconSet = lowerList[rowList]['icon']
								
								if id == relatedId1 :
									if(rowOuter > 1):
										try:    
											items = lowerList[rowList]['items']
											secondList.append({'label':(name1),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':lowestId,'relatedId':relatedId1},'items':items,'icon':iconSet})
										except KeyError:
											secondList.append({'label':(name1),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':lowestId,'relatedId':relatedId1},'icon':iconSet,'items':[]})
											#system.perspective.print("Second list  " + str(secondList))
											#system.perspective.print('HIERARCHY TREE REFRESH--KeyError')
									else:
										secondList.append({'label':(name1),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':lowestId,'relatedId':relatedId1},'icon':iconSet,'items':[]})     
							thirdList.append({'label':(str(unitLevel)+ rightArrow + str(name)),'expanded':True,'data':{'dataId':id,'relatedId':relatedId},'items':secondList,'icon':imgIcon})        
							#system.perspective.print("thirdList list  " + str(thirdList))
							secondList = []	
				lowestLevel = lowestLevel + 1    
						
				
				self.getChild("cntHierarchy").getChild("treeHierarchy").props.items = thirdList
				self.view.custom.exportData = thirdList
		#End of try block	
	except: 
		#start of except block  
			screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
			filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
			errorFunction = str('Event:onClick -> cntBody/TabContainer')  
			errorType=str('Application')  
			errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())

			lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
			Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
		#End of except block

onChange.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: Table refersh based on tab selection. 
	"""
	try:
		if previousValue!=currentValue and currentValue.value==1 :
			system.perspective.closeDock("rightp")
			system.perspective.closeDock("rightView")
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			messageType = 'tableRefresh1'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
		if previousValue!=currentValue and currentValue.value==0 :
			system.perspective.closeDock("rightp")
			system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
			self.getChild("cntTable").getChild("SearchPanel").props.params.Area=-1
			self.getChild("cntTable").getChild("SearchPanel").props.params.Line=-1
			self.getChild("cntTable").getChild("SearchPanel").props.params.Workstation=-1
			messageType = 'tableRefresh'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
			messageType = 'tableRefresh1'    	 			
			system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType,scope = 'page' )
	except:
		screenName ='Plant'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Plant')  
		errorFunction = str('Change Script:TabContainer -> cntBody/tblPlant')  
		errorType=str('Application') 
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

params.message: Plant removal will affect the various products. Are you sure you want to remove?

messageHandlers.script:
"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose:			 
					Validation over delete any row
		"""	
	try:
	#start of try block
		result = self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").custom.result
		StepCount = self.parent.getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").custom.StepCount
		if(int(result) > 0) and (int(StepCount)<1):
			self.meta.visible = payload['isVisible']
		elif(int(result) < 0) and  (int(StepCount)<1):
			self.getSibling("cntPopUp").meta.visible = 1
			self.getSibling("cntPopUp").props.params.lblValue = 'You cannot remove this unit, as other units are attached under this unit level.'	
		elif(int(StepCount) > 0) and (int(result) < 0):
			self.getSibling("cntPopUp").meta.visible = 1
			self.getSibling("cntPopUp").props.params.lblValue = 'You cannot remove this workstation as it is attached to other units and steps .'	
		else :
			self.getSibling("cntPopUp").meta.visible = 1
			self.getSibling("cntPopUp").props.params.lblValue = 'You cannot remove this workstation as it is attached to steps.'
		
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Message Handler:deletePop -> cntBody/cntDelete')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

"""
			Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
			Written Date: 27/03/2024
			Purpose:			 
					To open popup
		"""	
	# implement your handler here
	try:
	#start of try block
		self.meta.visible = payload['display']
		self.props.params.lblValue = payload['text']
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block

config.script:
"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose: for deselect row selection and refreshing add/edit panel	
	"""	
	try:
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").props.selection.selectedRow = -1
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").props.selection.selectedColumn = ''
		system.perspective.sendMessage("deleteIsVisible",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")
		system.perspective.sendMessage("isEditDisplay",payload = {"IsVisible":0}, scope = "page")    
		system.perspective.closeDock('rightp')
		system.perspective.openDock("rightView")
		headerLabel = "Add"
		messageType = 'plantPanel'
		payload = {'headerLabel':headerLabel,'UnitName':'','UnitDescription':'','UnitLabelTo':-1,'WorkStationType':-1,'IPAddress':'','AttachedTo': -1,'WorkStationTypeId':-1,'LineTypeID':-1,'PlantCode':'','PlantAddress':''}		 			
		system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload, scope = 'page' )
	except:
		screenName ='Plant'
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/Plant')  
		errorFunction = str('onRoot -> cntBody/tblPlant')  
		errorType=str('Application') 
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber)

"""
		Written By: Gaurav Amrutkar
		Written Date: 27/03/2024
		Purpose:			 
				After Session TimeOut all custom property of session are cleared.	
	"""	
	try:
	#start of try block  
		self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("TabContainer").props.currentTabIndex = 0
		system.perspective.sendMessage("tableHierarchy",scope = "page")	
	#End of try block	
	except: 
	#start of except block  
		screenName ='Plant Configuration'   
		filePath=str('Project_VECV/Admin/PlantConfiguration')  
		errorFunction = str('Event:onStartup -> root')  
		errorType=str('Application')  
		errorCode = str(Project_VECV.Common.GenerateUUID.getUniqueUUID())   
		description=str(sys.exc_info()[1]) #error description 
		lineNumber=str(sys.exc_info()[2].tb_lineno) #lineno on which error 
		Project_VECV.Configuration.Common.AddLogDetails.AddErrorLogs(screenName,filePath,errorFunction,errorType,errorCode,description,lineNumber) 
	#End of except block

messageHandlers.script:
# implement your handler here
		"""
			Written By: Niladri Banerjee
			Written Date: 17/05/2024
			Purpose:			 
					To Export Details
		"""	
		try:
			data=self.getChild("cntColumn").getChild("cntBody").getChild("TabContainer").getChild("cntTable").getChild("tblEquip").props.data
			columns=["Unit name","Unit description","Unit level","Attached To","Workstation Type","IP Address","Active"]
			data=system.dataset.filterColumns(data, columns)
			XLSFormat = system.dataset.dataSetToExcel(True,[data])
			system.perspective.download("PlantTable.xls",XLSFormat)				
		#End of try block	
		except:
